title: Key Fields
text: Key Fields Ordered list of fields comprising the specified Key of a Modeled Entity. Applies To Key Relationship Related Links Relationships A relationship is an association between one entity and another. It is modeled as a development object belonging to the many-side entity in a one-to-many relationship. Keys A key is a field or combination of fields that uniquely identifies occurrences of entities.
